title: Perform machinery maintenance
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Perform machinery maintenance demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to maintain equipment

pcs.text: Determine job requirements from workplace instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine job requirements from workplace instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine job requirements from workplace instructions.

pcs.text: Source and interpret machinery and equipment operation and maintenance manual servicing information
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Source and interpret machinery and equipment operation and maintenance manual servicing information?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Source and interpret machinery and equipment operation and maintenance manual servicing information.

pcs.text: Select suitable and safe work site for maintenance activities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select suitable and safe work site for maintenance activities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select suitable and safe work site for maintenance activities.

pcs.text: Identify workplace hazards, assess risks and implement risk controls
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify workplace hazards, assess risks and implement risk controls?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify workplace hazards, assess risks and implement risk controls.

pcs.text: Select and check for serviceability tools, equipment and materials according to operation and maintenance manual
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and check for serviceability tools, equipment and materials according to operation and maintenance manual?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and check for serviceability tools, equipment and materials according to operation and maintenance manual.

pcs.text: Fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment according to job requirements and operation and maintenance manual
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment according to job requirements and operation and maintenance manual?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment according to job requirements and operation and maintenance manual.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to maintain equipment

elements.title: Inspect engine and components

pcs.text: Carry out regular engine and component checks on machinery and equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Carry out regular engine and component checks on machinery and equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out regular engine and component checks on machinery and equipment.

pcs.text: Lubricate all relevant grease or lubricant points
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Lubricate all relevant grease or lubricant points?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Lubricate all relevant grease or lubricant points.

pcs.text: Change oils and filters at intervals prescribed in operation and maintenance manual
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Change oils and filters at intervals prescribed in operation and maintenance manual?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Change oils and filters at intervals prescribed in operation and maintenance manual.

pcs.text: Check hydraulic hoses and systems for deterioration and rectify defects according to operation and maintenance manual
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check hydraulic hoses and systems for deterioration and rectify defects according to operation and maintenance manual?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check hydraulic hoses and systems for deterioration and rectify defects according to operation and maintenance manual.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Inspect engine and components

elements.title: Inspect transmission

pcs.text: Check drive and steering clutches for operation and adjust where applicable according to operation and maintenance manual
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check drive and steering clutches for operation and adjust where applicable according to operation and maintenance manual?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check drive and steering clutches for operation and adjust where applicable according to operation and maintenance manual.

pcs.text: Check transmission oil levels
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check transmission oil levels?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check transmission oil levels.

pcs.text: Check tracks or wheels and undercarriage for oil leaks and wear
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check tracks or wheels and undercarriage for oil leaks and wear?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check tracks or wheels and undercarriage for oil leaks and wear.

pcs.text: Identify faulty seals or leaks and take corrective actions according to operation and maintenance manual
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify faulty seals or leaks and take corrective actions according to operation and maintenance manual?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify faulty seals or leaks and take corrective actions according to operation and maintenance manual.

pcs.text: Clean machinery according to workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean machinery according to workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean machinery according to workplace requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Inspect transmission

elements.title: Maintain components and attachments

pcs.text: Check components for wear and condition
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check components for wear and condition?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check components for wear and condition.

pcs.text: Replace worn or unserviceable components according to operator and maintenance manual
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Replace worn or unserviceable components according to operator and maintenance manual?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Replace worn or unserviceable components according to operator and maintenance manual.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete component inspection and replacement activities in line with workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Check moving operational components for wear and condition and adjust to the tolerances specified in operator and maintenance manual

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check moving operational components for wear and condition and adjust to the tolerances specified in operator and maintenance manual.

pcs.text: Clean and maintain work areas and return to operating condition
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean and maintain work areas and return to operating condition?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean and maintain work areas and return to operating condition.

pcs.text: Collect, treat and dispose or recycle waste from maintenance activities according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collect, treat and dispose or recycle waste from maintenance activities according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collect, treat and dispose or recycle waste from maintenance activities according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Record identified faults and defects in machine record
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record identified faults and defects in machine record?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record identified faults and defects in machine record.

pcs.text: Record maintenance procedures in workshop record in line with workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record maintenance procedures in workshop record in line with workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record maintenance procedures in workshop record in line with workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Report service or repair requirements to management
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report service or repair requirements to management?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report service or repair requirements to management.

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
